---
title: "Week 11"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (4/27)
:::

**Topics**

-   Conditional expectation (given an event)

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_29.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (4/29)
:::

**Topics**

-   Conditional expectation (given a random variable)

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (5/01)
:::

**Topics**

-   Conditional variance

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity
